pass_rule: Provider terms or written permission allow personal/local analysis export or API use
fail_rule: Terms prohibit local export/cache or are unclear
evidence_to_collect: terms URL or saved agreement note

pass_rule: Data comes from documented API/download/CSV/XLS export
fail_rule: Only accessible by scraping rendered pages or bypassing controls

pass_rule: Two exports have matching headers and numeric fields parse cleanly
fail_rule: Field names drift or numeric columns contain prose/question marks
evidence_to_collect: two sample exports plus validation report

pass_rule: At least 95 percent of sample players map cleanly to Sleeper/nflverse and no high-value ambiguous match remains
fail_rule: Ambiguous identity for any high-value player or low overall mapping rate

pass_rule: At least one critical/near-critical bucket improves: role/usage
column7: Provider duplicates free data without improving gaps

pass_rule: Provider supplies routes run plus at least two of route participation target share TPRR YPRR
fail_rule: Provider lacks route/usage fields or only gives generic summaries

pass_rule: Provider supplies numeric RB opportunity share or enough carries targets red-zone and goal-line fields to derive it
fail_rule: RB workload appears only as prose or team-level context

pass_rule: Projection stat columns can be rescored into LVE no-PPR first-down format
fail_rule: Only provider fantasy points are available or scoring cannot be audited

pass_rule: Injury current status/history fields are sourced and date-stamped
fail_rule: Healthy labels are unsourced or stale

pass_rule: Every imported field can appear with raw value source date source status and warning
fail_rule: Fields cannot be audited by player

pass_rule: Trial rows stay under local_exports/paid_data_trials and do not alter active model outputs
fail_rule: Trial mutates active rankings or data packs

pass_rule: Provider fills important gaps at a cost worth testing beyond sample
fail_rule: Cost is high and fields do not solve actual blockers
